backend/main.mo: Defines core actor logic for servers, channels, messages, posts, DMs, and user profiles with access control and storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing features, associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Mapping of frontend file paths to short human-written descriptions of component behavior and purpose.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base config defining light/dark theme CSS variables and global styles.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML file mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes and wraps the app in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Authentication guard showing a sign-in prompt when the user is not logged in.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button handling Internet Identity auth and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/channels/Channel: Channel list UI with create, edit, delete, and selection functionality, restricted by server ownership.
frontend/src/components/channels/CreateC: Form for creating a new server channel with name validation and mutation handling.
frontend/src/components/dms/DmComposer.t: Direct message composer supporting text, media uploads, URLs, and user mentions.
frontend/src/components/dms/DmThreadList: Lists DM threads with user info, last message preview, and selection handling.
frontend/src/components/dms/DmTimeline.t: Displays a DM conversation timeline with polling and message composer.
User search input for starting a new DM thread.
frontend/src/components/empty/EmptyState: Reusable empty-state component showing an image, title, and description.
frontend/src/components/feed/PostCompose: Form for creating posts with text, image uploads, or image URLs.
frontend/src/components/feed/PostItem.ts: Renders a post with author info, timestamp, media, and delete support.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppHeader: Top app header with logo link and login button.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main layout with header, navigation, routed content, and profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppNav.ts: Navigation component providing desktop sidebar and mobile bottom nav.
frontend/src/components/media/Attachment: Displays image attachments in a grid and allows removing individual items.
Handles image selection, validation, upload with progress, and returns uploaded attachments.
frontend/src/components/messages/Channel: Fetches and displays channel messages with loading states and includes the message composer.
frontend/src/components/messages/Message: Manages composing messages with text, mentions, attachments, and optional image URLs.
Renders a single message with author info, content, attachments, and optional deletion.
frontend/src/components/profile/AvatarUp: Uploads and validates avatar images with progress tracking and completion callback.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileP: Shows a popover with user profile details, avatar, and optional extended fields.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileS: Modal for first‑time profile setup with display name and optional avatar via URL or upload, submitting through saveProfile.
frontend/src/components/profile/UserAvat: Displays a user avatar from URL or binary attachment with fallback initial based on display name.
frontend/src/components/servers/CreateSe: Form to create a new server with a name field, using useCreateServer and success/cancel callbacks.
frontend/src/components/servers/ServerLi: Lists servers with selection, creation, editing, and deletion support, including owner‑only actions.
frontend/src/components/users/UserAutoco: Search-input component that fetches user results, supports keyboard navigation, and allows selecting a user.
frontend/src/constants/polling.ts: Exports polling intervals for active and background states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the current identity, invalidating dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, managing login, stored identity loading, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, servers, channels, posts, messages, and search results using an actor API.
frontend/src/hooks/useViewPollingEnabled: Enables polling only when the route matches and the document is visible by tracking visibility and router state.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base layers and custom CSS variables for light and dark themes with global styling rules.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility function that merges class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app, wraps it with React Query and Internet Identity providers, and loads global styles.
frontend/src/pages/DirectMessagesPage.ts: Renders the direct messages UI with a DM list, a start-DM form, and a timeline for the selected conversation.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Displays the global feed with polling, post creation, and a list of latest posts or an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSettingsPage.t: Provides a full profile settings form allowing editing of display name, avatar, bio, links, and other extended fields.
frontend/src/pages/ServersPage.tsx: Manages server and channel selection and shows their lists and timelines with deletion handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Implements helpers for reading, storing, persisting, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration enabling dark mode, custom OKLCH color variables, extended theming, animations, and typography/container/animate plugins.
project_state.json: JSON snapshot describing the project’s current feature set and versions for an MVP social/messaging app with auth, feeds, servers, DMs, polling, media uploads, and UI themes.
